ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "information_type" TEXT /* Type of market data (e.g., WEP, USEP, AFP) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the data point (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "wep" REAL /* Wholesale electricity price ($/MWh) */,
  "usep" REAL /* Unconstrained wholesale electricity price ($/MWh) */,
  "afp" REAL /* Adjusted wholesale electricity price ($/MWh) */,
  "heur" REAL /* Hourly energy uplift rate ($/MWh) */,
  "hlcu" REAL /* Hourly loss compensation uplift rate ($/MWh) */,
  "meuc" REAL /* Market energy uplift charge ($/MWh) */,
  "emc_price_cap_fees" REAL /* Energy market company price cap fees ($/MWh) */,
  "emc_price_adj_fees" REAL /* Energy market company price adjustment fees ($/MWh) */,
  "pso_fees" REAL /* Participant service operator fees ($/MWh) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area where the data is applicable */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the data */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last validation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_period FOREIGN KEY ("period") REFERENCES periods ("period_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_information_type FOREIGN KEY ("information_type") REFERENCES information_types ("information_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "information_types" (
  "information_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each information type */,
  "information_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the information type (e.g., WEP, USEP, AFP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the information type */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data of this type is collected */,
  "data_retention_policy" TEXT /* Policy for how long data of this type should be retained */,
  "data_dictionary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data dictionary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("information_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the period */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data sync */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data sync */,
  "data_source_status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., market analyst, data administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being validated (e.g., WEP, USEP) */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_expression" TEXT /* Expression or condition for the validation rule */,
  "rule_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the rule (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "rule_creator_id" INTEGER /* User who created the rule */,
  "rule_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the rule was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_rule_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES information_types ("information_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each check */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being checked (e.g., WEP, USEP) */,
  "check_name" TEXT /* Name of the check */,
  "check_description" TEXT /* Description of the check */,
  "check_expression" TEXT /* Expression or condition for the quality check */,
  "check_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the check (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  "check_creator_id" INTEGER /* User who created the check */,
  "check_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the check was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES information_types ("information_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_check_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("check_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  "action_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "action_device" TEXT /* Device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "export_template" TEXT /* Template used for exporting data in the specified format */,
  "export_creator_id" INTEGER /* User who created the export format */,
  "export_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the export format was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_formats_export_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("export_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
